title: DecisionEvent
description: Runtime lifecycle event recording the outcome of an AnalysisResult decision — order placement, fill, rejection, position open/close, or error.

event_id.description: Unique identifier for this lifecycle event.

analysis_result_id.description: The analysis_result_id of the AnalysisResult that produced the decision underlying this event.

decision.description: The trade decision from the AnalysisResult.

order_id.description: Exchange or broker order identifier. Present for ORDER_PLACED / ORDER_FILLED / ORDER_REJECTED events.

position_id.description: Exchange or broker position identifier. Present for POSITION_OPENED / POSITION_CLOSED events.

executed_at.description: UTC timestamp when the event occurred.

metadata.description: Arbitrary metadata attached to the event (venue-specific fields, error details, fill quantities, etc.).
